backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Luxyle backend, implementing user profiles, feedback (submit/approve/reject), and appointments with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and MixinStorage mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old actor state (with admin credentials, feedback/appointment maps) into the new state shape retaining only userProfiles and blockedDates.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping each product feature (luxury theme, hero section, collections, etc.) to the implementing source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of each component, page, hook, and style file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with Layout (Header/Footer), routes for home, contact, and admin pages, plus QueryClientProvider and Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About Us section component rendering a split layout with the Luxyle about image, brand story text, gold divider, and three brand pillar cards.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-screen access denied UI component with a gold shield icon, heading, message, and a button to navigate back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginForm.t: Stub component that renders nothing; admin authentication is handled directly in AdminDashboard via useInternetIdentity.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentBooki: A form component for booking showroom appointments, allowing users to select a date, time slot, and enter contact details, with blocked-date validation and a success confirmation view.
frontend/src/components/CollectionGaller: Displays a responsive image gallery grid of 8 collection items with hover overlays and a lightbox with prev/next navigation.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedCollecti: Shows a 4-item featured collection grid with hover effects that scrolls to the full collection section when clicked.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: A review submission form with name, star rating, and text fields that posts feedback via a mutation hook and shows a success state on completion.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, services list, and contact/location details, including an Instagram link and Google Maps URL.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header that changes style on scroll, with desktop nav links, Instagram icon, a book-appointment CTA button, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section for the Luxyle brand featuring a background image, tagline, and two CTA buttons for booking an appointment (smooth scroll) and getting Google Maps directions.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsSection.t: Displays a grid of client reviews combining hardcoded seed reviews with dynamically fetched approved feedback from the backend, showing skeleton loaders while data is loading.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, returning an anonymous or authenticated actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all TanStack Query hooks for the app, covering admin checks, feedback CRUD (submit, approve, reject, fetch), and appointment operations (blocked dates, submit, fetch, update status).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind with a luxury design token palette (gold, ivory, royal-blue, etc.), and defines utility classes for typography, dividers, and shadows.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabs for managing pending feedback (approve/reject), appointments (approve/reject), and blocked dates (add/remove), using React Query hooks and Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page displaying location, hours, email, and Instagram info as cards, an embedded Google Map, and an appointment booking component.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page that composes the hero, stats bar, featured collections, gallery, about, reviews, feedback form, and appointment booking sections.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (including from hash-based routes), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the luxury brand palette (gold, ivory, beige, royal-blue), custom heading/body fonts, shadow utilities, and fade-in animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Luxyle luxury interior décor store, documenting version, architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and required image assets.
